# HiMGA

**Hierarchical Multi-Graph Architecture for Conversational Memory**

HiMGA 是一个研究型框架，利用层次化多图（Multi-Graph）与超图（Hypergraph）结构，
构建 SOTA 的对话记忆 LLM 智能体 RAG 系统。

---

```{toctree}
:maxdepth: 1
:caption: 快速上手

usage/staging
```

```{toctree}
:maxdepth: 1
:caption: 模块文档

module/agent
module/memory
module/llm
module/data
module/eval
```

```{toctree}
:maxdepth: 1
:caption: 数据集

datasets/locomo
datasets/longmemeval
```

```{toctree}
:maxdepth: 1

dev/staging/data
dev/staging/eval
```
